name: Pork Chili Con Carne
recipeIngredient: 1 medium green pepper diced (1 cup) or red pepper, or
3 cups canned diced tomatoes with juice, no salt added
1 can canned tomato sauce, no salt added (14 oz)
14 oz canned kidney beans, drained (10 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook ground pork, onion, and green/red pepper over medium heat for 5-10 minutes in a large deep frying pan or Dutch oven until the onion is soft and the meat is brown.
2. Add all remaining ingredients except kidney beans and simmer for 20 minutes.
3. Add kidney beans and simmer about 10 more minutes.
4. Top with sour cream and grated cheddar cheese and serve with tortilla chips, fresh rolls, or butter toast.
